sidebar.google_calendar_offline_tooltip: Google Calendar is not connected on this device
sidebar.trash.label: Archive
sync.disclosure.subscription_terms: {price} per {period}, billed to your Apple Account. Your subscription renews automatically unless cancelled at least 24 hours before the end of the current period. Manage or cancel anytime in Settings.
sync.error.account_status_unsupported: The sync API does not support account status yet.
sync.error.api_unreachable: Could not reach the sync API: {error}
sync.error.api_url_https_required: Sync API must use https:// (plain http is only allowed for localhost).
sync.error.api_url_scheme_required: Sync API must start with http:// or https://.
sync.error.authorize_retry: Sign-in could not be completed. Please try signing in again.
sync.error.cancel_not_configured: Subscription cancellation is not configured yet.
sync.error.checkout_account_mismatch: This checkout does not match the signed-in account.
sync.error.checkout_not_configured: Subscription checkout is not configured yet.
sync.error.checkout_url_missing: The sync API did not return a checkout URL.
sync.error.confirm_account_failed: Could not confirm the account. Please try again.
sync.error.email_not_verified: Verify your email before subscribing — check your inbox for the link.
sync.error.manage_in_app_store: Manage this App Store subscription from your Apple account subscriptions.
sync.error.no_active_subscription_yet: No active subscription found yet. If you just paid, wait a moment and try again.
sync.error.no_active_web_subscription: There is no active web subscription to change.
sync.error.open_checkout_failed: Could not open the checkout page: {error}
sync.error.reenable_in_app_store: Re-enable this App Store subscription from your Apple account subscriptions.
sync.error.reenable_in_play_store: Re-enable this subscription from your Google Play subscriptions.
sync.error.refresh_missing_token: sync refresh response missing refresh token
sync.error.request_failed: The request to the sync API failed.
sync.error.resend_rate_limited: You've requested this recently — wait a minute, then try again.
sync.error.session_expired_reauth: Your sync session expired. Please sign in again.
sync.error.session_expired_retry: Your sync session expired. Sign in again, then retry.
sync.oauth.callback.failure_body: Sign-in did not complete. You can close this tab and return to KnotQ.
sync.oauth.callback.success_body: You're signed in to KnotQ. You can close this tab and return to the app.
sync.popover.not_signed_in_detail: Sign in to sync this workspace across devices.
sync.popover.offline_detail: Changes are saved on this device and will sync automatically when you're back online.
sync.popover.sync_inactive_detail: Subscribe to enable cross-device notes and notifications.
sync.popover.title: KnotQ Sync
sync.popover.waiting_next_run: Waiting for the next automatic run.
update.error.locate_app_failed: Could not locate the running app: {error}
update.tooltip.restart_to_finish: Restart KnotQ to finish updating to {version}.
web.account.aria_auth_section: Sign in or create a KnotQ account
web.account.billing_active_web: Your web subscription is active. You can cancel renewal from this page.
web.account.billing_cancelled_apple_ends: Your subscription is cancelled. Sync stays active until the current period ends. Re-enable it from your Apple account subscriptions.
web.account.billing_cancelled_apple_unti: Your subscription is cancelled. Sync stays active until {date}. Re-enable it from your Apple account subscriptions.
web.account.billing_cancelled_google_end: Your subscription is cancelled. Sync stays active until the current period ends. Re-enable it from your Google Play subscriptions.
web.account.billing_cancelled_google_unt: Your subscription is cancelled. Sync stays active until {date}. Re-enable it from your Google Play subscriptions.
web.account.billing_cancelled_web_ends: Your subscription is cancelled. Sync stays active until the current period ends. Re-enable it from this page to keep renewing.
web.account.billing_cancelled_web_until: Your subscription is cancelled. Sync stays active until {date}. Re-enable it from this page to keep renewing.
web.account.billing_choose_plan: Choose monthly or annual to enable hosted sync for this account.
web.account.billing_managed_apple: This subscription is managed by Apple. Use your Apple account subscriptions to make billing changes.
web.account.billing_managed_google: This subscription is managed by Google Play. Use Google Play subscriptions to make billing changes.
web.account.billing_sync_active_no_sub: Sync access is active for this account without a web subscription.
web.account.cancel_confirm_body: Cancel renewal for this subscription? Sync stays available until the current period ends.
web.account.choose_plan_detail: Choose a sync plan to connect KnotQ across devices.
web.account.code_hint: Enter the code we emailed you.
web.account.code_hint_with_email: Enter the code we emailed to {email}.
web.account.delete_account_desc: Schedules your account and synced data for removal after a grace period.
web.account.delete_code_prompt: Enter the 6-digit code we emailed you to confirm deletion.
web.account.delete_confirm_body: Deletion schedules your account and synced data for removal after a 14-day grace period — sign in again within that window to cancel. Your local workspace stays on this device. If you subscribed through the App Store or Google Play, cancel that subscription in the store too; deleting your account here does not stop store billing.
web.account.delete_reauth_prompt: Type your account email and current password. We’ll email you a one-time code to confirm.
web.account.email_unverified_note: Confirm your email to enable KnotQ Sync. Check your inbox for the link.
web.account.err_account_deleted: This email belonged to a deleted account and can't be reused.
web.account.err_account_exists: An account already exists for that email. Sign in instead.
web.account.err_action_code_expired: That code has expired. Start the deletion again to get a new one.
web.account.err_action_too_many_attempts: Too many incorrect codes. Start the deletion again to get a new one.
web.account.err_auth_not_configured: The sync service is not configured yet.
web.account.err_cancel_in_app_store: Manage this subscription from your Apple account subscriptions.
web.account.err_cancel_in_play_store: Manage this subscription from Google Play.
web.account.err_code_expired: That verification code expired. Sign in again.
web.account.err_delete_confirmation_mism: Could not confirm the account email.
web.account.err_no_active_subscription: There is no active web subscription to change.
web.account.err_password_too_short: Use a password with at least 12 characters.
web.account.err_service_unavailable: The sync service is temporarily unavailable.
web.account.err_session_expired: Your session expired. Sign in again.
web.account.err_status_not_supported: The sync service does not support account status yet.
web.account.err_too_many_attempts: Too many incorrect codes. Sign in again.
web.account.error_code_invalid: Enter the 6-digit code we emailed you.
web.account.error_delete_wrong_page: Open the account page to delete your account.
web.account.error_email_mismatch: Email did not match. Account deletion was not started.
web.account.error_no_confirmation_code: The sync API did not return a confirmation code.
web.account.error_password_required_dele: Enter your current password to delete this account.
web.account.password_reset_desc: Change your password with a reset link sent to your account email.
web.account.status_account_created: Account created. Check your email for a link to verify your address.
web.account.status_delete_code_sent: We emailed you a code. Enter it to confirm deleting your account.
web.account.status_delete_scheduled: Account deletion scheduled. Sign in again within 14 days to cancel.
web.account.status_password_reset_maybe_: If an account exists for that email, a password reset link has been sent.
web.account.status_reenable_apple: Re-enable this subscription from your Apple account subscriptions.
web.account.status_reenable_google: Re-enable this subscription from your Google Play subscriptions.
web.account.status_verification_sent: Verification email sent. Check your inbox, then refresh this page.
web.account.sync_active_until_period_end: Hosted sync is active until your period ends
web.account.sync_detail_active: Your workspace stays current across every signed-in device.
web.account.sync_detail_cancelled: Sync stays current across your devices until the period ends — re-enable to keep it.
web.account.sync_detail_pitch: Sync schemes, schedules, task state, and notifications across mobile and desktop. Subscribe to turn it on.
web.account.sync_detail_verify_needed: Verify your email before you can subscribe — we sent a link to your account email when you signed up. KnotQ Sync turns on once it's confirmed.
web.account.sync_promo_point_workspace: Same workspace on desktop and mobile
web.account.sync_promo_tagline: Your notes, schedule, and notifications on every device.
web.account.sync_summary_inactive: Signed in. Sync is not active.
web.account.verify_gate_body: We sent a verification link to your account email. Confirm it to turn on KnotQ Sync.
web.auth.enter_code_we_emailed_you: Enter the code we emailed you.
web.auth.error_account_deleted: This email belonged to a deleted account and can't be reused.
web.auth.error_account_exists: An account already exists for that email.
web.auth.error_auth_not_configured: The sync service is not configured yet.
web.auth.error_code_expired: That code has expired. Start sign-in again to get a new one.
web.auth.error_password_too_short: Use a password with at least 12 characters.
web.auth.error_rate_limited: Too many attempts. Wait a moment and try again.
web.auth.error_too_many_attempts: Too many incorrect codes. Start sign-in again to get a new one.
web.auth.invalid_signin_link: This sign-in link is invalid. Start sign-in again from the KnotQ app.
web.auth.password_reset_sent_if_exists: If an account exists for that email, a password reset link has been sent.
web.billing.error_checkout_load_failed: Checkout couldn’t load. Please refresh and try again.
web.billing.error_create_account_first: Create a KnotQ account before subscribing.
web.billing.error_email_mismatch: This checkout link does not match the signed-in account.
web.billing.error_invalid_configuration: Checkout configuration is invalid. Verify the store and variant IDs in the billing settings.
web.billing.error_invalid_plan: Please choose a valid subscription plan.
web.billing.error_verify_before_subscrib: Verify your email before subscribing — check your inbox for the link.
web.billing.status_subscription_complete: Subscription complete — you can return to KnotQ. Sync turns on automatically.
web.billing.title_create_account_first: Create a KnotQ account before subscribing
web.checkout.placeholder_choose_period: Choose a billing period to load secure checkout.
web.checkout.point_cancel_anytime: Cancel anytime — your data always stays local
web.checkout.point_schemes_stay_in_step: Schemes, calendar, and media stay in step
web.checkout.point_sync_workspace: Sync your workspace and notifications across desktop and mobile
web.checkout.verify_gate_body: Confirm the verification link we sent to your account email. Checkout stays locked until your address is verified.
web.delete_account.contact_fallback_a: If you can no longer sign in, or you would prefer that we handle it for you, email
web.delete_account.contact_fallback_b: from the address associated with your account and ask us to delete your account. Do not send your password, OAuth tokens, or other secrets by email. We may ask you to verify ownership of the account before deleting it.
web.delete_account.deleted_item_account_: Your account record, including your email address and password hash.
web.delete_account.deleted_item_auth: Authentication sessions, refresh tokens, sign-in challenges, and authorization codes.
